creator: jkh@time.cdrom.com
text:
> 	using the "packages" menu of /stand/sysinstall, trying to
> 	install packages. The first package gets installed, but then
> 	the procedure hangs on the Information Dialog saying that
> 	"Package XXX was added successfully.". You can use CTRL-C at
> 	this point and abort the installation.

Hmmmm.  I will try to reproduce this - I think it may be the new wait()
code I added to reap the zombies when running as init.

						Jordan
